subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qábl-i-Qásim! Shatter the idols of vain imaginings in the name of thy Lord, the Lord of all mankind, and make mention of this unto men [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل قاسم کسر اصنام الاوهام باسم ربک مالک الانام و ذکر الناس بهذا
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @idolatry, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa]
